commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup

- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

repository.name: scrape-cn
repository.description: 专为中国大陆网站设计的数据抓取工具包 | Web scraping toolkit for Chinese websites — SPA rendering, anti-bot bypass, API interception

commit.message:
v3: Rewrite as reusable scraping toolkit for Chinese websites

Transform from a guide/tutorial into a library that others can directly use.

New architecture:
- lib/scraper.js: ChinaScraper class with 4 extraction strategies
  (auto, search box, API intercept, declarative)
- lib/presets.js: 13 battle-tested site configs (ByteDance, Tencent,
  Bilibili, Feishu portals, Boss直聘, etc.)
- index.js: clean entry point

API: scraper.scrape(target, options) handles the full pipeline:
  navigate → wait → search → click → extract → paginate → dedup

Old guide moved to docs/how-it-works.md.
Old scripts moved to examples/ with 6 new example files.

commit.message:
Fix: add hl= locale param to Google Ads search URL for Turkish names

Accept-Language header didn't work for constant resources. Google APIs
support hl= system parameter for language — add it to the GAQL search
URL so user_interest, detailed_demographic, life_event names return
in the UI language (tr/en).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enrich optimizer tool descriptions for better LLM usage (#4031)

* Enrich optimizer tool descriptions for better LLM usage

The `find_tool` and `call_tool` MCP tools exposed by the optimizer had
minimal descriptions that did not give LLMs enough context to use them
effectively. LLMs rely heavily on tool descriptions to decide when and
how to invoke tools, so sparse descriptions led to poor tool discovery
and incorrect invocations.

This aligns the Go descriptions with the richer ones in the Python
mcp-optimizer reference (`server.py`), covering:
- When and why to use each tool (use cases)
- What the tools return (response structure)
- Workflow guidance (always call find_tool before call_tool)
- Examples for find_tool queries
- Detailed parameter descriptions with examples for input schemas

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix unit tests with tool descriptions

---------

repository.description: What if AI could solve the matching problem that money was invented for? A protocol for exchanging surplus capacity without currency.

commit.message:
Improve fleet orchestration feel: windowed command pulse + 0× speed

- TempoSystem: replace one-shot pulse with a timed window model.
  When the pulse fires, a window opens for kWindowDuration (6s/3.5s/2s
  by band). Any number of ships can be ordered freely during the window.
  After the window closes, the next window opens after the full cycle.
  First order of the game starts the first timed window; subsequent
  orders within the same window are no-ops (don't advance the clock).
  Band changes still open a window immediately.

- BattleState: add commandWindowEnd field (default = double.infinity
  so the game starts with ordering fully open).

- KinematicSystem: replace binary stop/brake with proportional speed
  cap. Ships now approach targets using safeSpeed = sqrt(2*a*d*0.8),
  easing in smoothly instead of rushing then slamming brakes.

- HudOverlay: add 0× to time scale selector (tactical planning mode —
  freezes battle simulation without the pause-menu overlay).

- Tests: update advanceCommandPulse test to reflect new windowed semantics.

commit.message:
fix pretrain_21k: own @hydra.main with absolute config path

Hydra could not resolve config_path="configs" when __main__ was
pretrain_21k.py but the decorator lived in pretrain.py.
Fix: define a new @hydra.main in pretrain_21k.py pointing to the
configs directory via an absolute Path(__file__).parent path,
then call pretrain.main.__wrapped__(cfg) to reuse the logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: regression learning pipeline — tanh output + MSE loss + full backprop

Three critical mismatches caused mode collapse (all outputs identical):

1. Output activation sigmoid [0,1] vs targets [-1,1] — switched to tanh
2. BCE loss clamped negative targets to 0 — use MSE for distillation mode
3. Backprop only updated outputs where target > 0.5 (~5-10% of dims) —
   new backprop_sparse_full_regression() computes MSE gradients on ALL
   2048 output dimensions

Also: batched Claude parent — pre-generates all narrations per stage in
one call (zero blocking during training), with built-in fallback content.

Results: loss drops 44% faster (0.275 vs 0.495 at step 2000), cross-
similarity stable at 0.977 instead of collapsing toward 1.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Afficher HT en petit sous le TTC dans le header PAC (mode fournisseur)

avec le coût HT. Même style que le iteSidebarHT côté ITE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(bot): remove tab navigation for order notes — fields already in DOM

The Panoramica/Overview tab is already active during order creation.
All fields (PURCHORDERFORMNUM, TEXTEXTERNAL, TEXTINTERNAL) exist in
the DOM from the start. The tab click was causing issues: after save
the page reloads and the click had no effect or switched to wrong tab.

Now just waits for DevExpress idle after previous save, then fills
fields directly via ASPx.EValueChanged. No tab switching needed.

fix: Skip scopes actions when no pull request context is available (#154)

The `scopes` and `scopes-upload` actions need a pull request number.
On push events there is no PR, causing the API call to fail with a
cryptic parsing error. This guards the scopes steps with a
`github.event.pull_request` condition so they no-op gracefully.
